info.title: NextMotion External API
info.description:
# Authentication

This document provides details on how to authenticate and use an API key to access the API services securely. Follow the steps below to generate, use, and manage your API key.

---

## Table of Contents

- [Authentication](#section/Authentication)
  - [Table of Contents](#section/Authentication/Table-of-Contents)
  - [Generating an API Key](#section/Authentication/Generating-an-API-Key)
  - [Using the API Key](#section/Authentication/Using-the-API-Key)
    - Example
  - [Managing the API Key](#section/Authentication/Managing-the-API-Key)
    - Key Expiry
    - Rerolling or Deleting a Key
  - [Security Best Practices](#section/Authentication/Security-Best-Practices)

---

## Generating an API Key

To use the API, you must first generate an API key:

1. **Login to the Web App**: Use your credentials to log in to the [web application](https://app.nextmotion.net).
2. **Navigate to Settings**: Once logged in, go to the **Settings** page.
3. **Access API Keys**: Click on the **API Keys** section within the Settings page.
4. **Generate a Key**: Click the button to generate a new API key. Ensure you copy and store it securely as you won't be able to view it again.

---

## Using the API Key

After obtaining an API key, include it in all HTTP requests by specifying it in the Authorization header, as demonstrated below:

```http
Authorization: Bearer {api_key}
```

### Example

If your API key is `abc123`, your header should look like this:

```http
Authorization: Bearer abc123
```

---

## Managing the API Key

### Key Expiry

- API keys **do not expire** automatically. Once created, they remain valid until you take action.

### Rerolling or Deleting a Key

1. **Rerolling**: If you believe your API key is compromised or want to refresh it, navigate to the API Key section in Settings and use the **Reroll Key** option. This will invalidate the old key and generate a new one.
2. **Deleting**: To revoke access permanently, you can delete an API key from the same section.

---

## Security Best Practices

- **Keep It Confidential**: Never share your API key publicly or expose it in client-side code, public repositories, or anywhere it can be accessed by unauthorized individuals.
- **Use Environment Variables**: Store your API key securely using environment variables instead of hardcoding it in your application.
- **Regenerate When Compromised**: If you suspect your API key has been compromised, immediately reroll it or delete it.
- **Access Control**: Use separate API keys for different applications or environments (e.g., development, staging, production).

---

By following these steps and best practices, you can securely authenticate and manage your access to the API. For further assistance, please contact support at [contact@nextmotion.net](mailto:contact@nextmotion.net).

get.description:
OpenApi3 schema for this API. Format can be selected via content negotiation.

- YAML: application/vnd.oai.openapi
- JSON: application/vnd.oai.openapi+json

parameters.name: clinic_id
parameters.description: Available clinic IDs can be retrieved via e.g. `clinic_list`

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return in the response

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Initial index from which to return results, use this to paginate through results

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter patient contacts by (full/part of) name, birth date, phone number or patient ID

items.description:
* `0` - EMPLOYEE
* `1` - EXECUTIVE
* `2` - PATIENT
* `3` - NEXTMOTION_ADMIN
* `4` - FILLMED_ADMIN
* `5` - MERZ_ADMIN

* `patient_activation` - PATIENT_ACTIVATION
* `shared_treatment` - SHARED_TREATMENT
* `review` - REVIEW
* `info_documents` - INFO_DOCUMENTS
* `cosmetics_checkout` - COSMETICS_CHECKOUT
* `prescription` - PRESCRIPTION
* `draft_quote` - DRAFT_QUOTE
* `quote` - QUOTE
* `quote_checkout` - QUOTE_CHECKOUT
* `quote_info_documents` - QUOTE_INFO_DOCUMENTS
* `draft_invoice` - DRAFT_INVOICE
* `invoice` - INVOICE
* `consent_form` - CONSENT_FORM
* `appointment_scheduled` - APPOINTMENT_SCHEDULED
* `appointment_reminder` - APPOINTMENT_REMINDER
* `appointment_next_visit_reminder` - APPOINTMENT_NEXT_VISIT_REMINDER
* `appointment_modified` - APPOINTMENT_MODIFIED
* `appointment_canceled` - APPOINTMENT_CANCELED
* `administrative_document` - ADMINISTRATIVE_DOCUMENT
* `appointment_request_verification` - APPOINTMENT_REQUEST_VERIFICATION
* `signin_reminder` - SIGNIN_REMINDER
* `next_treatment_reminder` - NEXT_TREATMENT_REMINDER
* `group_documents` - GROUP_DOCUMENTS
* `voucher_gifted` - VOUCHER_GIFTED
* `visit` - VISIT

price_percent.description: Percentage of price allocation (0-100), as a string with up to 2 decimal places

vat_rate.description: VAT rate as a decimal string with at most 1 decimal place

details.description: Description of the accounting distribution rule or context

price_percent.description: Percentage of price allocation (0-100), as a string with up to 2 decimal places

vat_rate.description: VAT rate as a decimal string with at most 1 decimal place

details.description: Description of the accounting distribution rule or context

model.description: Exactly two distribution lines (clinic and provider) splitting takings; price_percent must sum to 100% across lines

ActionTypeEnum.description:
* `patient_create` - PATIENT_CREATE
* `patient_update` - PATIENT_UPDATE
* `patient_delete` - PATIENT_DELETE
* `quote_create` - QUOTE_CREATE
* `quote_validate` - QUOTE_VALIDATE
* `quote_accept` - QUOTE_ACCEPT
* `invoice_create` - INVOICE_CREATE
* `invoice_validate` - INVOICE_VALIDATE
* `invoice_paid` - INVOICE_PAID
* `payment_create` - PAYMENT_CREATE
* `appointment_request_create` - APPOINTMENT_REQUEST_CREATE
* `calendar_appointment_create` - CALENDAR_APPOINTMENT_CREATE
* `calendar_appointment_next_visit_remind` - CALENDAR_APPOINTMENT_NEXT_VISIT_REMIND
* `calendar_appointment_update` - CALENDAR_APPOINTMENT_UPDATE
* `calendar_appointment_delete` - CALENDAR_APPOINTMENT_DELETE
* `calendar_appointment_start` - CALENDAR_APPOINTMENT_START
* `calendar_appointment_end` - CALENDAR_APPOINTMENT_END
* `review_request_send` - REVIEW_REQUEST_SEND
* `visit_create` - VISIT_CREATE
* `visit_audio_attach` - VISIT_AUDIO_ATTACH
* `calendar_appointment_absence_intersect` - CALENDAR_APPOINTMENT_ABSENCE_INTERSECT
* `treatment_remind` - TREATMENT_REMIND
* `lead_create` - LEAD_CREATE
* `communication_record_create` - COMMUNICATION_RECORD_CREATE
* `chat_message_send` - CHAT_MESSAGE_SEND
* `chat_message_receive` - CHAT_MESSAGE_RECEIVE

AppointmentDevice.description: Single serializer for list/retrieve/create/update/delete. Availability is set when list query params are provided; otherwise null.

visit_types.description: List of visit type IDs that can be booked with this device, available visit type IDs can be retrieved via e.g. `clinic_visit_type_list`

sub_visit_types.description: List of sub-visit type IDs related to the visit types, available sub-visit type IDs can be retrieved via e.g. `clinic_sub_visit_type_list?visit_type={visit_type_id}`

color.description: RGBA hex in range 00000000 to ffffffff

treatment_pricing.description: Treatment pricing ID; available IDs via e.g. `clinic_treatment_type_pricing_list`

BasicTreatmentPackage.description: Treatment package without item lines (e.g. OpenAPI list).

BasicTreatmentType.description: Treatment type read representation without nested pricings.

calendar_event.description: Calendar event details such as start time, end time, etc.

visit_type.description: Visit type ID for the appointment, available visit type IDs can be retrieved via e.g. `clinic_visit_type_list`

sub_visit_type.description: Sub-visit type ID for the appointment related to the picked visit type ID, available sub-visit type IDs can be retrieved via e.g. `clinic_sub_visit_type_list?visit_type={visit_type_id}`

subject.description: Appointment visit type subject, it's usually set to the sub-visit type or visit type subject

room.description: Appointment room ID associated with the calendar appointment, deprecated - field in the calendar_event object needs to be used

device.description: Device ID that'll be used for this appointment, available device IDs can be retrieved via e.g. `clinic_appointment_device_list`

status.description:
Current status of the appointment, "deleted" or "suspended" cannot be set by the user

* `none` - NONE
* `waiting_room` - WAITING_ROOM
* `canceled_last_minute` - CANCELED_LAST_MINUTE
* `absent` - ABSENT
* `with_provider` - WITH_PROVIDER
* `seen_by_provider` - SEEN_BY_PROVIDER
* `suspended` - SUSPENDED
* `deleted` - DELETED

send_appointment_modified_email.description: Whether to send an appointment modified email notification to the patient

send_appointment_modified_sms.description: Whether to send an appointment modified sms notification to the patient

CalendarAppointmentUpdateStatusEnum.description:
* `none` - NONE
* `waiting_room` - WAITING_ROOM
* `canceled_last_minute` - CANCELED_LAST_MINUTE
* `absent` - ABSENT
* `with_provider` - WITH_PROVIDER
* `seen_by_provider` - SEEN_BY_PROVIDER
* `suspended` - SUSPENDED
* `deleted` - DELETED

title.description: Title or label for the calendar event, usually it's the patient's or doctor's full name

notes.description: Additional notes or comments about the calendar event

color.description: RGBA HEX color code from 00000000 to ffffffff, used to display the event in the calendar UI

doctors.description: Doctor IDs of event providers, available doctor IDs can be retrieved via e.g. `clinic_doctor_list`, required if appointment room ID is not provided

appointment_rooms.description: Room IDs for the event, available appointment room IDs can be retrieved via e.g. `clinic_appointment_room_list`, required if doctor ID is not provided

appointment_devices.description: Device IDs for the event, available device IDs can be retrieved via e.g. `clinic_appointment_device_list`

start_time.description: Start time of the event (in ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2025-06-05T10:00:00+02:00), timezone info is available in clinic list

end_time.description: End time of the event (in ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2025-06-05T11:00:00+02:00, must be after start time), timezone info is available in clinic list

recurrence.description:
How the event repeats; if custom, step, interval, and related fields are required

* `one_time` - ONE_TIME
* `daily` - DAILY
* `daily_mon_through_fri` - DAILY_MON_THROUGH_FRI
* `daily_mon_through_sat` - DAILY_MON_THROUGH_SAT
* `weekly_on_day_of_week` - WEEKLY_ON_DAY_OF_WEEK
* `biweekly_on_day_of_week` - BIWEEKLY_ON_DAY_OF_WEEK
* `custom` - CUSTOM

custom_recurrence_step.description: Repeat every N steps when recurrence is custom

custom_recurrence_interval.description:
Time unit for custom recurrence step; required when recurrence is custom

* `day` - DAY
* `week` - WEEK
* `month` - MONTH
* `year` - YEAR

custom_recurrence_week_days.description: Which weekdays the event repeats on when recurrence is custom and interval is week; array of integers where 0=Monday, 6=Sunday

custom_recurrence_month_by_day_number.description: When interval is month: if true, repeat on the same day number of the month (e.g., 15th of every month); if false, repeat on the same weekday occurrence (e.g., first Monday of every month)

custom_recurrence_end_date.description: Optional last date (inclusive) for custom recurrence; must not be before start date

calendar_event.description: Calendar event details such as start time, end time, doctors, rooms, etc.

slots_count.description: Maximum number of appointments that can be booked at the same time slot, e.g. if set to 3, up to 3 appointments can be booked at 8:00 AM simultaneously, sharing the available doctors and rooms

are_slots_unique.description: If true, visit types share the same time slots - if visit type A is booked at 8:00, visit type B cannot be booked at 8:00 (they compete for the same slots_count limit); if false, each visit type has dedicated slots and can be booked independently at the same time, each respecting the slots_count limit separately

requires_available_doctor_and_room.description: Only applies when both doctors and rooms are assigned to the opening hour; if true, both a doctor and a room must be available together (as a pair) for booking; if false, appointments can be booked with just a doctor OR just a room (whichever is available)

visit_types.description: List of visit type IDs that can be booked during this opening hour, available visit type IDs can be retrieved via e.g. `clinic_visit_type_list`

sub_visit_types.description: List of sub-visit type IDs related to the visit types, available sub-visit type IDs can be retrieved via e.g. `clinic_sub_visit_type_list?visit_type={visit_type_id}`

calendar_event.description: Calendar event details such as start time, end time, doctors, rooms, etc.

slots_count.description: Maximum number of appointments that can be booked at the same time slot, e.g. if set to 3, up to 3 appointments can be booked at 8:00 AM simultaneously, sharing the available doctors and rooms

are_slots_unique.description: If true, visit types share the same time slots - if visit type A is booked at 8:00, visit type B cannot be booked at 8:00 (they compete for the same slots_count limit); if false, each visit type has dedicated slots and can be booked independently at the same time, each respecting the slots_count limit separately

requires_available_doctor_and_room.description: Only applies when both doctors and rooms are assigned to the opening hour; if true, both a doctor and a room must be available together (as a pair) for booking; if false, appointments can be booked with just a doctor OR just a room (whichever is available)

visit_types.description: List of visit type IDs that can be booked during this opening hour, available visit type IDs can be retrieved via e.g. `clinic_visit_type_list`

sub_visit_types.description: List of sub-visit type IDs related to the visit types, available sub-visit type IDs can be retrieved via e.g. `clinic_sub_visit_type_list?visit_type={visit_type_id}`

id.description: Optional client-supplied message ID; if omitted the server generates one

text_body.description: Plain-text message body; required if html_body is set; at least one of text_body, html_body or media_file must be provided

html_body.description: Optional HTML body; send together with text_body; cannot be combined with media_file

position.description: Ordering position for sorting rooms in lists

activate_online_booking.description: Whether this room is available for online appointment booking

color.description: RGBA HEX color code from 00000000 to ffffffff, used to display the room in the calendar UI

visit_types.description: List of visit type IDs that can be booked in this room, available visit type IDs can be retrieved via e.g. `clinic_visit_type_list`

sub_visit_types.description: List of sub-visit type IDs related to the visit types, available sub-visit type IDs can be retrieved via e.g. `clinic_sub_visit_type_list?visit_type={visit_type_id}`

visit_type_category.description: Reference to a visit type category, used for Doctolib integration as a specialty mapping, otherwise null

review.description: URL to external review system. Eg. google, healthgrades, etc.

name.description: Display name of the treatment group

treatment_id.description: Reference to the treatment ID for an invoiced treatment line, cannot be used together with treatment package fields

treatment_package_id.description: Reference to the treatment package ID for an invoiced package line

treatment_package_extract_id.description: Treatment package extract ID for the invoiced line, required when treatment_package_id is provided

name.description: For invoiced treatment or package lines, optional; if omitted, copied from the invoice line; for custom lines (no treatment or package), display name for the line

details.description: For invoiced treatment or package lines, optional; if omitted, copied from the invoice line; for custom lines, details text for the line

amount.description: Credited amount for this line as a decimal string with 2 decimal places

subamount.description: Per-subpricing bucket amounts and reimbursments when the invoiced treatment uses subpricing; bucket amounts must sum to amount if provided; if omitted and the invoice line has subpricing, the server fills this from the invoice line; when the line uses accounting distribution, subpayment_amounts must be provided if this is omitted

items.description: One subpricing bucket: credited price, reimbursment, optional subreimbursment, and details text

price.description: Credited amount for this subpricing bucket as a decimal string with 2 decimal places

reimbursment.description: Reimbursment for this bucket as a decimal string with 2 decimal places

subreimbursment.description: When accounting distribution is used, reimbursment per subpayment as decimal strings; same string format as check, cash, card, transfer, and other amounts on deposit payment subpayments; [clinic, provider]

items.description: Reimbursment amount for one subpayment as a decimal string with 2 decimal places

details.description: Description or label for this subpricing bucket (same role as invoice line bucket details)

subpayment_amounts.description: Split of the credited amount across clinic and provider subpayments when the invoice line uses accounting distribution; required when the line has subpricing with distribution and subamount is omitted so the server can generate subamount; [clinic, provider]

items.description: Amount for one subpayment as a decimal string with 2 decimal places

vat_rate.description: For invoiced treatment or package lines, ignored; VAT rate is always taken from the invoice line; for custom lines only, VAT rate as percent (eg 10.5)

reimbursment.description: For invoiced treatment or package lines, optional; if omitted, the server computes reimbursment from invoice payments, prior credit notes on the same line, and this line amount; for custom lines, provide when needed

subreimbursment.description: Per-subpayment reimbursment amounts for treatment or package lines when accounting distribution applies; if omitted, the server computes per-subpayment reimbursments when distribution applies; when provided, total reimbursment is derived from these values; [clinic, provider]

items.description: Reimbursment amount for one subpayment as a decimal string with 2 decimal places

stock_level.description: Initial digital stock level for this product at the clinic

warning_level.description: Low-stock threshold; when on-hand quantity should trigger a warning

unit_price.description: Selling or internal unit price for this clinic

note_tmpl.description: Template for the note/document body. Object with template JSON. No template is {}. Stored template is at least {"html": "HTML"}.

```json
  "a": [
    {"q_id": "type 1 question ID", "val": "answer to this question"},

    {"q_id": "type 3 question ID", "val": "radio button ID"},
    {"q_id": "type 4 question ID", "val": ["checkbox ID", ...]},
    {"q_id": "type 5 question ID", "val": 0},
    {"q_id": "type 6 question ID", "val": "data:image/jpeg;base64,..."},
    {"q_id": "type 7 question ID", "val": "2025-06-05"},
  ]
}

```

admin_price.description: Price paid for the feature when overridden, null to clear

payment_method.description:
Payment method used when manually paid

* `stripe` - STRIPE
* `purchasely` - PURCHASELY
* `bank_transfer` - BANK_TRANSFER

sale_time.description: When the feature was sold or purchased (admin override), ISO 8601

cancel_time.description: When the feature was cancelled (admin override), ISO 8601

end_time.description: When the feature access expires (admin override), null means no expiry, ISO 8601

color.description: RGBA hex in range 00000000 to ffffffff

id.description: Optional; on create used as new sub-visit type id if provided, omit for server-generated; on update include to update existing, omit to create new (list order = position)

color.description: Hex color for the sub-visit type (e.g. ffffff)

subject.description: Display name of the sub-visit type

bolt_note.description: Bolt note (survey form) ID; available IDs via e.g. `clinic_survey_form_list?type=bolt_note`

display_in_agenda.description: Whether to show this sub-visit type in the agenda

display_in_dashboard.description: Whether to show this sub-visit type in the dashboard

display_in_patient_file.description: Whether to show this sub-visit type in the patient file visit create form

display_in_appointment_form.description: Whether to show this sub-visit type in the appointment form

next_visit_reminder_days.description: Days after visit to trigger next visit reminder (0 to disable)

enable_treatment_pre_payments.description: Whether to allow pre-payment for treatments (appointment_treatment_presets)

appointment_treatment_presets.description: Treatment presets for this sub-visit type; treatments created when a patient books an appointment with this sub-visit type

pricing.description: Treatment pricing ID for the line, available treatment pricing IDs can be retrieved via e.g. `clinic_treatment_pricing_list`

sessions.description: Session count used when extracting the package into a consultation, overrides the pricing line default sessions for that step

consultation.description: Consultation to extract the package into

treatment.description: When set, removes this treatment after extraction, used when the UI creates an empty row before applying the package

id.description: Available treatment IDs can be retrieved via `patient/consultation_treatment_list`, all treatments must come from the same consultation and be in status NEW or REJECTED

price.description: Overrides the unit price (after VAT, before discount) from treatment pricing if provided

vat_rate.description: Overrides the percentage VAT amount (0.0 to 100.0) from treatment pricing if provided

quantity.description: Number of units of this treatment performed (e.g. 2 fillings), defaults to 1

rebate.description: Absolute rebate amount applied to the treatment price

rebate_percent.description: Percentage rebate amount (0.00 to 100.0) applied to the treatment price

markup.description: Absolute markup amount applied to the base price, deprecated

name.description: Descriptive name for the subpricing item

price.description: Part of the treatment price as decimal string, sum of prices needs to be equal to treatment unit price

rebate.description: Discount amount applied to the sub-item as decimal string, sum of rebates needs to be equal to treatment rebate

markup.description: Additional markup to be applied as decimal string, sum of markups needs to be equal to treatment markup, deprecated

vat_rate.description: Percentage VAT amount as decimal string (0.0 to 100.0) for the part of treatment price

distributed_to.description: Distribution destination: 0 for CLINIC, 1 for PROVIDER, null if not distributed. If set, all subpricing items must have this field.

accounting_code.description: Optional accounting code for this subpricing item.

subpricing.description: Overrides structured data from treatment pricing for detailed components of the price if provided, can be used to e.g. assign different VAT rates to parts of the base price

price_percent.description: Percentage of price allocation (0-100), as a string with up to 2 decimal places

vat_rate.description: VAT rate as a decimal string with at most 1 decimal place

details.description: Description of the accounting distribution rule or context

accounting_distribution_model.description: Overrides structured data from treatment pricing defining how the treatment's revenue should be distributed between clinic and provider if provided

vat_rate_frac.description: VAT rate as decimal fraction. Eg. 0.105

id.description: Optional; on create used as new pricing id if provided, omit for server-generated; on update include to update existing, omit to create new (list order = position)

price.description: Price with included VAT, this is the marked price before any rebate is applied

rebate.description: Absolute rebate amount (with VAT included) to subtract from the price, the final price will be price minus rebate

details.description: Additional details or description for this pricing option

name.description: Descriptive name for the subpricing item

price.description: Part of the treatment price as decimal string, sum of prices needs to be equal to treatment unit price

rebate.description: Discount amount applied to the sub-item as decimal string, sum of rebates needs to be equal to treatment rebate

markup.description: Additional markup to be applied as decimal string, sum of markups needs to be equal to treatment markup, deprecated

vat_rate.description: Percentage VAT amount as decimal string (0.0 to 100.0) for the part of treatment price

distributed_to.description: Distribution destination: 0 for CLINIC, 1 for PROVIDER, null if not distributed. If set, all subpricing items must have this field.

accounting_code.description: Optional accounting code for this subpricing item.

subpricing.description: List of sub-pricing items with individual prices, rebates, markups, and VAT rates; cannot be provided if accounting_distribution is set

sessions.description: Number of treatment sessions included in this pricing option

accounting_code.description: Accounting code to be used for this pricing option in accounting systems

products.description: List of products associated with this pricing option

survey_form.description: Reference to the survey form (consent form) ID to be used with this pricing

appointment_visit_type.description: Reference to the visit type ID that patients can book appointments with from the portal when the treatment is paid

appointment_sub_visit_type.description: Reference to the sub-visit type ID that patients can book appointments with from the portal when the treatment is paid; must belong to the visit type specified in appointment_visit_type

accounting_distribution.description: Reference to the accounting distribution ID for this pricing; cannot be provided if distributed_to or subpricing is set

distributed_to.description:
Distribution target for sub-payments; cannot be provided if accounting_distribution is set

* `0` - CLINIC
* `1` - PROVIDER

next_treatment_reminder_days.description: Number of days after treatment completion to send a reminder for the next treatment (0 = no reminder); only used if send_reminder_on_invoice_paid is enabled

duplicate_on_invoice_paid.description: Whether to automatically duplicate this treatment when the invoice is paid

send_reminder_on_invoice_paid.description: Whether to send a reminder when the invoice for this treatment is paid; if enabled, uses next_treatment_reminder_days to determine when

require_products_before_invoice_create.description: Whether products must be added to the treatment before an invoice can be created

TreatmentSessionStatusEnum.description:
* `none` - NONE
* `new` - NEW
* `planned` - PLANNED
* `paid` - PAID
* `package` - PACKAGE
* `control` - CONTROL
* `late_cancellation` - LATE_CANCELLATION

id.description: Optional; if provided, the new treatment type gets this id, omit for server-generated

pricings.description: List of pricings to create for this treatment type

visit_type.description: Default visit type ID used when creating visits from treatments of this type; available IDs via e.g. `clinic_visit_type_list`

sub_visit_type.description: Default sub-visit type ID used when creating visits from treatments of this type; must belong to the visit type specified in visit_type; available IDs via e.g. `clinic_sub_visit_type_list?visit_type={visit_type_id}`

display_in_dashboard.description: Whether to show this treatment type in the dashboard

create_visit.description: Whether booking this treatment creates a visit

pricings.description: Send the full list — items with id are updated, items without id are created, items omitted from the list are deleted

visit_type.description: Default visit type ID used when creating visits from treatments of this type; available IDs via e.g. `clinic_visit_type_list`

sub_visit_type.description: Default sub-visit type ID used when creating visits from treatments of this type; must belong to the visit type specified in visit_type; available IDs via e.g. `clinic_sub_visit_type_list?visit_type={visit_type_id}`

display_in_dashboard.description: Whether to show this treatment type in the dashboard

create_visit.description: Whether booking this treatment creates a visit

patient.description: Patient ID associated with this visit, available patient IDs can be retrieved via e.g. `clinic_patient_list`

subject.description: Visit subject, usually it's set to the related sub-visit type or visit type subject

visit_time.description: Start time of the visit (ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2025-06-05T10:00:00+02:00), timezone info is available in clinic list

visit_end_time.description: End time of the visit (ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2025-06-05T10:00:00+02:00), timezone info is available in clinic list

color.description: RGBA HEX color code from 00000000 to ffffffff, usually it's set to the related sub-visit type or visit type color

note.description: Notes made during the visit, in HTML format (e.g. <p>First line</p><p><strong>Second</strong> line</p>, ignored if quickfill_fields is provided

q_id.description: Question ID related to this answer

provider_sign_base64.description: Base64 image of the visit provider's signature

media_file.description: PDF document binary data attached to the visit, can be uploaded only using multipart/form-data Content-Type

audio.description: Audio binary data for the visit, can be uploaded only using multipart/form-data Content-Type

audio_transcript.description: Transcript text of the audio recording done during the visit

use_chatgpt_transcript_summary.description: Whether to generate a summary of the audio transcript using ChatGPT integration, if audio transcript is provided and this is set to true, sent note is ignored and replaced by the transcript summary

visit_type.description: Visit type ID for the visit, available visit type IDs can be retrieved via e.g. `clinic_visit_type_list`

sub_visit_type.description: Sub-visit type ID for the visit related to the picked visit type ID, available sub-visit type IDs can be retrieved via e.g. `clinic_sub_visit_type_list?visit_type={visit_type_id}`

treatment.description: Assign the visit to a patient's treatment ID, available treatment IDs can be retrieved via e.g. `patient_treatment_list`

treatment_session.description: Assign the visit to a patient's treatment session ID related to a calendar appointment

calendar_journey.description: Assign the visit to a patient's calendar journey ID, available calendar journey IDs can be retrieved via e.g. `clinic_calendar_journey_list?patient={patient_id}`

q_id.description: Question ID related to this answer
Question ID related to this answer

document_template.description: Document template ID to render the PDF document from, available document template IDs can be retrieved via `clinic_document_template_list?type={document_type}`

created_time.description: Invoice issue date, today's date will be assigned if left empty

invoiced_time.description: Invoice sale date, today's date will be assigned if left empty

quote.description: Reference to the quote ID associated with this invoice, needs to be provided if treatments are quoted

treatments.description: Treatments to be included in the invoice, cannot be provided if treatments are quoted

rebate.description: Absolute rebate amount to subtract from the invoice total, cannot be provided if the invoice is being created using quote ID

rebate_percent.description: Percentage rebate amount (0.00 to 100.00) to apply on the invoice total, cannot be provided if the invoice is being created using quote ID

rebate_details.description: Additional comments or notes regarding the applied rebate

voucher_code.description: Voucher code applied to the invoice

free_text.description: Additional comments or notes to include on the invoice

payments.description: Payment details related to the invoice

do_validate.description: Whether to turn draft invoice into a validated invoice

ignore_social_security_treatment_price.description: Whether to ignore default social security treatment price, deprecated

color.description: RGBA hex in range 00000000 to ffffffff

q_id.description: Question ID related to this answer

color.description: RGBA hex in range 00000000 to ffffffff

category.description: Visit type category ID; available IDs can be retrieved via e.g. `clinic_visit_type_category_list`

subject.description: Display name of the visit type

color.description: Hex color for the visit type (e.g. FEC0CB)

sub_visit_types.description: List of sub-visit types to create for this visit type

next_visit_reminder_days.description: Days after visit to trigger next visit reminder (0 to disable)

enable_treatment_pre_payments.description: Whether to allow pre-payment for treatments (appointment_treatment_presets)
